title: "Research and Assessment"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

This page is under construction.

# Current Projects

## Education and Assessment

-   Collaboration Curriculum with Dr. Emily Wang (Oberlin College) and Dr. Ashley Walker (Google)

-   Collaboration and Parsons Problems with Dr. Emily Wang (Oberlin College)

-   TITLE HERE with Aidan Thompson (Fitchburg State '27)

-   TITLE HERE with Aidan Thompson (Fitchburg State '27)

-   TITLE HERE with Dr. Amy Wehe (Fitchburg State)

# Past Projects

## Education and Assessment

## Graph Theory
